testcase.name: test002_InMemoryDataset
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 2 testInMemoryDataset ---------------------------- In-memory dataset created successfully as expected
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: test003_GetInstance
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 3 testGetInstance ---------------------------- getInstance() returned correct dataset instance as expected getInstance() returned correct dataset instance as expected

testcase.name: test004_QueryTimeout
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 4 testQueryTimeout ---------------------------- Query timeout set correctly to 30000 as expected

testcase.name: test005_AllowUpdate
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 5 testAllowUpdate ---------------------------- Dataset allows updates as expected

testcase.name: test006_AddQuad
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 6 testAddQuad ---------------------------- Quad added successfully to dataset as expected

testcase.name: test007_AddRdfStarTriple
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 7 testAddRdfStarTriple ---------------------------- RDF* triple added successfully to dataset as expected

testcase.name: test008_AddDecStatement
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 8 testAddDecStatement ---------------------------- DEC statement added successfully to DecStatements map as expected

testcase.name: test009_AddGraph
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 9 testAddGraph ---------------------------- Graph added successfully to dataset as expected

testcase.name: test010_Clear
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 10 testClear ---------------------------- Dataset contains all quads as expected Clearing datasetGraph Clearing universes Clearing reifications Clearing DecStatements Dataset is empty after clear as expected

testcase.name: test011_ClearAllSparql
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 11 testClearAllSparql ---------------------------- Dataset contains quads after SPARQL insert as expected
Reasoning Dataset is empty after CLEAR ALL as expected

testcase.name: test012_SingleQuadSparql
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 12 testSingleQuadSparql ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Finished reasoning
Single quad added successfully via SPARQL as expected

testcase.name: test013_MultipleQuadsSparql
testcase.system-out:
- 13 testMultipleQuadsSparql
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Finished reasoning
Multiple quads added successfully via SPARQL as expected

testcase.name: test014_DeleteQuadsSparql
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 14 testDeleteQuadsSparql ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Finished reasoning
Quad in g2 preserved successfully after deletion as expected Quad in g1 deleted successfully as expected

testcase.name: test015_DecStatements
testcase.system-out: ---------------------------- 15 testDecStatements ---------------------------- All DEC statements found in DecStatements map as expected All DEC statements stored with correct triples as expected

testcase.name: test016_DoxasticGraphWithRdfType
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 16 testDoxasticGraphWithRdfType ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Finished reasoning
DecReasoner has same validity as direct OWL reasoning DecReasoner has same number of validity issues as direct OWL reasoning Both reasoners made the same inference about A being of type B

testcase.name: test017_VerbatimGraphWithSaysRange
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 17 testVerbatimGraphWithSaysRange ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/Alice @http://example.org/says http://example.org/g1 Restoring triple: http://example.org/g1 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/verbatimUniverse Restoring triple: http://example.org/says @rdfs:range http://dec.fabiovitali.it/verbatimUniverse Finished reasoning
Alice says g1 as expected says predicate has correct verbatim range as expected

testcase.name: test018_SubClassInference
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 18 testSubClassInference ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Finished reasoning
a is of type B as expected B is subclass of C as expected a is inferred to be of type C as expected

testcase.name: test019_SubclassInferenceSelect
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 19 testSubclassInferenceSelect ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Finished reasoning
a is of type B as expected B is subclass of C as expected a is inferred to be of type C as expected

testcase.name: test020_SubclassInferenceConstruct
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 20 testSubclassInferenceConstruct ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Finished reasoning
a is inferred to be of type C as expected

testcase.name: test021_MultipleGraphTypes
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 21 testMultipleGraphTypes ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/g2 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/verbatimUniverse Restoring triple: http://example.org/g1 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/sharedUniverse Restoring triple: http://example.org/g3 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/doxasticUniverse Finished reasoning
Entity a is of type E in default graph as expected Entity a is not of type E in graph g3 as expected Entity a is of type D in graph g3 as expected Entity a is not of type D in default graph as expected Entity a is not of type B in graph g2 as expected Entity a is not of type C in graph g2 as expected

testcase.name: test022_MultipleGraphTypesWithPredicates
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 22 testMultipleGraphTypesWithPredicates ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/g3 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/doxasticUniverse Restoring triple: http://example.org/g1 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/sharedUniverse Restoring triple: http://example.org/knows @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/epistemicPredicate Restoring triple: http://example.org/believes @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/doxasticPredicate Restoring triple: http://example.org/g2 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/epistemicUniverse Restoring triple: http://example.org/bruce @http://example.org/believes http://example.org/g3 Restoring triple: http://example.org/alice @http://example.org/knows http://example.org/g2 Finished reasoning
Entity a is of type E in default graph as expected Entity a is not of type E in graph g3 as expected Entity a is of type D in graph g3 as expected Entity a is not of type D in default graph as expected Entity a is of type C in default graph as expected Entity a is not of type C in graph g3 as expected

testcase.name: test023_OwlReasoningComparison
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 23 testOwlReasoningComparison ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Finished reasoning
DecReasoner has same validity as direct OWL reasoning DecReasoner has same number of validity issues as direct OWL reasoning: 7 Both reasoners made the same inference about A being of type B

testcase.name: test024_RdfStarWithSameAsDoxastic
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 24 testRdfStarWithSameAsDoxastic ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples Processing RDF-star universe: http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/bf4227b2 http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/bf4227b2 Removed original triple from reality graph: http://example.org/LoisLane @http://example.org/thinks http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/bf4227b2 restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/thinks @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/doxasticPredicate Finished reasoning
It is not stated that ClarkKent can fly, as expected LoisLane does not think ClarkKent can fly as expected

testcase.name: test025_RdfStarWithSameAsConjectural
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 25 testRdfStarWithSameAsConjectural ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples Processing RDF-star universe: http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/7b3a365f http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/7b3a365f Removed original triple from reality graph: http://example.org/MotherKent @http://example.org/supposes http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/7b3a365f restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/supposes @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/conjecturalPredicate Finished reasoning
It is not stated that ClarkKent can fly, as expected MotherKent supposes ClarkKent can fly as expected

testcase.name: test026_RdfStarWithSameAsEpistemic
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 26 testRdfStarWithSameAsEpistemic ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples Processing RDF-star universe: http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/235ec9f3 http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/235ec9f3 Removed original triple from reality graph: http://example.org/superman @http://example.org/knows http://dec.fabiovitali.it/rdfstar/235ec9f3 restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/knows @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/epistemicPredicate Finished reasoning
It is stated that ClarkKent can fly, as expected Superman does not know ClarkKent can fly as expected

testcase.name: test027_ReifiedTriplesWithSameAsDoxastic
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 27 testReifiedTriplesWithSameAsDoxastic ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdf:type rdf:Property Processing triple: http://example.org/superman @http://example.org/can http://example.org/fly Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdfs:subPropertyOf http://example.org/can Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdf:type rdfs:Resource restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/LoisLane @http://example.org/thinks http://dec.fabiovitali.it/reification/72712caf Restoring triple: http://example.org/thinks @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/doxasticPredicate Restoring triple: http://dec.fabiovitali.it/reification/72712caf @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/doxasticUniverse Finished reasoning
It is not stated that ClarkKent can fly, as expected LoisLane does not think ClarkKent can fly as expected

testcase.name: test029_ReifiedTriplesWithSameAsEpistemic
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 29 testReifiedTriplesWithSameAsEpistemic ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdf:type rdf:Property Processing triple: http://example.org/superman @http://example.org/can http://example.org/fly Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdfs:subPropertyOf http://example.org/can Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdf:type rdfs:Resource restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/knows @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/epistemicPredicate Restoring triple: http://example.org/superman @http://example.org/knows http://dec.fabiovitali.it/reification/37cf1cd6 Restoring triple: http://dec.fabiovitali.it/reification/37cf1cd6 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/epistemicUniverse Finished reasoning
It is stated that ClarkKent can fly, as expected

testcase.name: test030_ReifiedTriplesWithSameAsNirvana
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 30 testReifiedTriplesWithSameAsNirvana ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdf:type rdf:Property Processing triple: http://example.org/superman @http://example.org/can http://example.org/fly Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdfs:subPropertyOf http://example.org/can Processing triple: http://example.org/can @rdf:type rdfs:Resource restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/knows @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/epistemicPredicate Restoring triple: http://example.org/superman @http://example.org/knows http://dec.fabiovitali.it/reification/37cf1cd6 Restoring triple: http://dec.fabiovitali.it/reification/37cf1cd6 @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/epistemicUniverse Finished reasoning
It is stated that ClarkKent can fly, as expected

testcase.name: test031_InferenceWithClearAll
testcase.system-out:
---------------------------- 31 testInferenceWithClearAll ----------------------------
Reasoning clearDataForReasoning handleReifications assignDecTypes assignDecPermeations and inference settings evaluatePointsOfView() prepareRestore restoreReifications restoreRdfTriples restoreDefaultGraph Restoring triple: http://example.org/conjecturalGraph @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/conjecturalUniverse Restoring triple: http://example.org/epistemicGraph @rdf:type http://dec.fabiovitali.it/epistemicUniverse Finished reasoning
Mario correctly inferred as instance of Animal Alice correctly inferred as instance of Animal in conjectural graph Alice correctly not inferred as instance of Animal in default graph Query returned results as expected Dataset is empty after CLEAR ALL as expected
